posts.text: Few think that the world’s next trillion-dollar tech company will be European. But, perhaps for the first time, that does not seem a silly idea https://www.economist.com/business/2026/03/01/at-last-reasons-to-be-cheerful-about-european-tech
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: BREAKING: Iran says it will no longer attack neighboring countries or launch missiles unless an attack on Iran originates from those countries.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: I believe @hkuppy referred to this as a 'turkey shoot'. Who is going to volunteer to be the turkey?
